meta.name: description
meta.content: AuctionChamp — India's complete cricket auction and tournament management platform. Player registrations, live auctions, fixtures, points tables and more.

head.title: AuctionChamp — India's Cricket Auction & Tournament Management Platform

t.t-esc: config.hero_headline or 'India\'s Complete Cricket Auction & Tournament Management Platform'
config.hero_subheading or 'Manage Player Registrations, Cricket Auctions, Teams, Fixtures, Points Tables, Live Updates and Tournament Operations from one powerful platform.'

div.p: AuctionChamp helps tournament organizers automate everything — from player registration to the final match report.
Automate player registrations, auction lots, fixture generation and results publishing — tasks that used to take days now take minutes.
No more spreadsheets or paper forms. AuctionChamp handles data collection, validation, and reporting end to end.
Every bid is logged with a timestamp. Teams see live budget tracking and bid history, ensuring complete transparency.
Publish match results, points tables, and statistics the moment a match ends — keep players and fans engaged in real time.
Team owners can bid, check standings, and view player cards from any smartphone. No app download required.
Your data is securely hosted in the cloud. Access your tournament dashboard from anywhere, anytime, on any device.

div.h2: Everything You Need to Run a World-Class Tournament
div.p: From the first player registration to the trophy presentation — AuctionChamp covers every step.
Allow players to register themselves online through a unique public link.
Create and manage tournaments from setup to season-end effortlessly.
Organise teams, owners, budgets, and rosters in one place.
The flagship AuctionChamp feature — a complete live bidding system.
A professional full-screen presentation screen for auction events.
Generate professional digital player profiles instantly.
Generate complete match schedules automatically in seconds.
Complete match-day operations from toss to final result.
Automatically updated standings after every match result.
Advanced tournament insights and performance data.
Promote sponsors professionally across the platform.
A public-facing tournament website ready in minutes.
Generate and export comprehensive tournament reports instantly.

div.h2: Experience the Excitement of Live Cricket Auctions
div.p: AuctionChamp's auction engine brings the IPL-style bidding experience to your local tournament. Real-time bids, live display screens, and automatic budget validation make every auction unforgettable.

div.style: margin-top:8px; display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap:8px; width:100%; max-width:280px;
background:rgba(245,166,35,.15); border:1px solid rgba(245,166,35,.3); border-radius:8px; padding:10px 14px; display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;

div.p: These tournaments are conducting live player auctions at this moment. Track the current player on stage, see the latest bid, and jump straight into the live board.
Seven simple steps from setup to a successfully completed tournament.
Set up your tournament, categories, venues, and rules
Share the public link and collect player registrations
Add team owners, assign wallets, and set player tiers
Conduct the live auction with real-time bid tracking
Auto-generate the full match schedule in one click
Record results, update points table, track statistics
Share final standings, reports and player stats

t.t-esc: config.testimonial_1_text or 'Managing our auction became effortless with AuctionChamp. The live bidding dashboard is incredibly smooth.'
config.testimonial_2_text or 'Player registration and auction management saved us countless hours. Highly recommended for every league.'
config.testimonial_3_text or 'Professional auction experience for players and team owners. The live display screen is outstanding.'

div.p: Choose the plan that fits your tournament size. All plans include full auction functionality.
Perfect for small local leagues
Built for growing tournaments
For large-scale tournaments

Players register through a unique public link. They fill in their profile, upload a photo, select their playing role, and provide batting/bowling details. The organizer reviews and approves each entry.
Yes! AuctionChamp provides a fully digital live auction dashboard. Players are presented one by one, bids are placed in real time, and the system automatically validates team budgets.
Absolutely. Team owners can participate from any device with a browser. The live auction display and bid board can be shared publicly, making remote participation seamless.
Yes. AuctionChamp supports league, pool-based, knockout, and round-robin formats. Fixtures are auto-generated based on teams, venues, and your scheduling preferences.
AuctionChamp manages complete tournament seasons. You can run tournaments sequentially and maintain historical player statistics and auction records for every season.

div.span: Can I host it on my own domain?

div.p: AuctionChamp is cloud-hosted. Contact our team to discuss custom domain and white-labelling options available for enterprise clients.

div.h2:
Ready to Run Your Next Cricket Auction
Like a Professional?
div.p: Join hundreds of tournament organizers across India who trust AuctionChamp.

t.t-esc: config.about_us_text or 'AuctionChamp is India\'s leading cricket auction and tournament management platform, trusted by hundreds of organizers across the country.'
